title: Knysna Golf Club Championship a winner
description: GOLF NEWS - What an incredible showcase of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - What an incredible showcase of talent at our 2024 Knysna Golf Club Championship!","html":"GOLF NEWS - What an incredible showcase of talent at our 2024 Knysna Golf Club Championship!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We had 172 players over two days and we appreciate all the support our members have given this event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A round of applause for James Coetzee for acing the 12th hole with a spectacular hole-in-one! And let's not forget the dramatic finish with a two-hole playoff, culminating in sudden death on the 18th hole; it was everything you could wish for in a club championship!","html":"A round of applause for James Coetzee for acing the 12th hole with a spectacular hole-in-one! And let's not forget the dramatic finish with a two-hole playoff, culminating in sudden death on the 18th hole; it was everything you could wish for in a club championship!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Congratulations to all the winners of their respective divisions:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Men's A Division","html":"Men's A Division"},{"type":"list","items":["Winner – Hawken Lederle (72)(75) = 147","Runner-up – Marc Laubscher (76)(71) = 147","Third – Anthony Parker – (75)(73) = 148","Overall Nett Winner – Shawn Brown (73)(70) = 143","James Coetzee – Hole-in-one on the 12th hole"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Men's Senior Champion","html":"Men's Senior Champion"},{"type":"list","items":["Simon Hunt (75)(73) = 148"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Men's B Division","html":"Men's B Division"},{"type":"list","items":["Winner – Michael Sims (84)(82) = 166","Runner-up – Neil Louw (81)(87) = 168","Third – Hendri van der Merwe (81)(87) = 168","Overall nett winner – Michael Sims (74)(72) = 146"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Men's C Division","html":"Men's C Division"},{"type":"list","items":["Winner – Johan Rautenbach (41)(38) = 79 Points","Runner-up – Casper Lessing (44)(34) = 78 Points"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ladies Silver Division","html":"Ladies Silver Division"},{"type":"list","items":["Winner – Leigh Fredericks (79)(87) = 166","Runner-up – Marion Klimmer (86)(83) = 169","Overall nett winner – Sunette Venter (68)(74) = 142"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ladies Bronze Division","html":"Ladies Bronze Division"},{"type":"list","items":["Winner – Clare Charlwood (87)(92) = 179","Runner-up – Helen Rossouw (95)(91) = 186","Overall nett winner – Clare Charlwood (68)(73) = 141"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ladies Copper Division","html":"Ladies Copper Division"},{"type":"list","items":["Winner – Marina Kok (29)(33) = 62 Points","Runner-up – Marisa Raffinetti (34)(22) = 56 Points"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nearest to the pins","html":"Nearest to the pins"},{"type":"list","items":["2nd: Jason Swanepoel","8th: Gael Stephens","12th: Sue Pearson","14th: Tony Richards"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sunday","html":"Sunday"},{"type":"list","items":["2nd: Marina Kok","8th: Craig van der Venter","12th: James Coetzee (hole in one)","14th: KJ Redman"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A special thanks to PSG Wealth Insure Knysna, and all our other sponsors for helping us make this an unforgettable event. From left are Johan Rautenbach (Men’s C-Division winner), Leigh Fredericks (Ladies champion), Hawken Lederle (Men’s Champion), Michael Sims (Men’s B-Division winner), Clare Charlwood (Ladies B-Division winner) and Marina Kok (Ladies C-Division winner).","html":"A special thanks to PSG Wealth Insure Knysna, and all our other sponsors for helping us make this an unforgettable event. From left are Johan Rautenbach (Men’s C-Division winner), Leigh Fredericks (Ladies champion), Hawken Lederle (Men’s Champion), Michael Sims (Men’s B-Division winner), Clare Charlwood (Ladies B-Division winner) and Marina Kok (Ladies C-Division winner)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
